'''Trade Federation Patrol Boats''' were [[Boat/Legends|boats]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] in the many lakes, rivers, and seas of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. They had a crew of two [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s and were armed with one [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. A flotilla were used to patrol a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] camp on the [[Solleu River/Legends|Solleu River]]; they failed to interdict three [[Naboo Resistance]] rescue ships from [[Raid on the Solleu River|escaping]] with the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]].

==Behind the scenes==
Trade Federation Patrol Boats appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']].

*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] {{1st}}
